csaf.note: Walk the top-level product_tree.branches array and select branches where category == 'vendor'. The 'name' field of that branch is the vendor name. product_tree is at the TOP LEVEL of the stored document, not under 'document'.

euvd.note: Direct extraction from the enisaIdVendor array. Each entry has a nested vendor object with a name field.

formatting.note: Do not remove special chars globally — vendor names like 'C++' or 'Node.js' contain meaningful special characters.

vendor_in_product_name.note: In CSAF product trees, the vendor name appears as the parent branch (category='vendor') and the product name as a child branch (category='product_name'). The join pipeline should use this hierarchy rather than trying to strip vendor names from free-text product name strings. For EUVD, enisaIdVendor and enisaIdProduct are separate arrays and should be linked by matching array index or the shared 'id' field.
